ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "name" TEXT /* Common name of the country */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Official name of the country */,
  "regimetype" TEXT /* Type of regime (e.g., Full democracy) */,
  "iso2" TEXT /* ISO 2-letter code */,
  "iso3" TEXT /* ISO 3-letter code */,
  "internet_tld" TEXT /* Internet country code top-level domain */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the country belongs to */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Subregion within the continent */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Primary currency used in the country */,
  "capital_coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the capital city (latitude and longitude) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "democracy_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the score belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the score was recorded */,
  "overall_score" REAL /* Overall democracy score */,
  "electoral_process" REAL /* Score for electoral process and pluralism */,
  "functioning_of_government" REAL /* Score for functioning of government */,
  "political_participation" REAL /* Score for political participation */,
  "political_culture" REAL /* Score for political culture */,
  "civil_liberties" REAL /* Score for civil liberties */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the score data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_democracy_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "democracy_score_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the score being tracked */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the score was recorded */,
  "overall_score" REAL /* Overall democracy score for the year */,
  "electoral_process" REAL /* Score for electoral process and pluralism for the year */,
  "functioning_of_government" REAL /* Score for functioning of government for the year */,
  "political_participation" REAL /* Score for political participation for the year */,
  "political_culture" REAL /* Score for political culture for the year */,
  "civil_liberties" REAL /* Score for civil liberties for the year */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical score data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_democracy_score_history_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES democracy_scores ("score_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the region is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_regions" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the country belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id", "region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geography" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country's centroid */,
  "time_zones" TEXT /* Time zones within the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economy" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate of the country */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the country */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the country */,
  "gini_index" REAL /* Gini index for income inequality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data used to generate the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the report */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_components" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "component_data" TEXT /* Data for the component */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the component */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the component was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the component */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the component was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id", "component_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who downloaded the data */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being downloaded */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was downloaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the downloaded file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the downloaded file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
